name: guru-review-contract-wording
description: Review controlled contract wording through fixed change-request, planning-artifact, or explicit-path scope, semantic revision and classification, deterministic evidence, and typed exits.

entry_preconditions.evidence: installed extension manifest, dispatcher, active package inventory and declared record/check runtime commands
entry_preconditions.binding: complete compatible Guru Team preset runtime
entry_preconditions.freshness: validated by run-skill-command before every runtime command

entry_preconditions.evidence: one complete fixed profile scope with normalized item identities and current content hashes
entry_preconditions.binding: change_request title/body plus selected authoritative comments, the three planning artifacts, or the explicit repo-relative Markdown paths
entry_preconditions.freshness: the checker rebuilds the selected profile scope and rejects selector narrowing or content drift

entry_preconditions.evidence: AI-reviewed authority for each proposed content mutation, exact confirmed-payload digest, and current live mutation-result identity when required
entry_preconditions.binding: only the issue, draft, planning artifact, or explicit Markdown content authorized by the invocation
entry_preconditions.freshness: live issue revisions bind source/locator/field, preimage, confirmed content, current reread content and source update time through rescan and checking

entry_preconditions.evidence: AI-authored revisions, retained-hit classifications and reasons, Review Gate judgment, and conditional human confirmation
entry_preconditions.freshness: every content change rebuilds scope and scan before semantic evidence can be recorded

entry_preconditions.evidence: mode, profile, scope, scan, semantic review, confirmation, result identities and caller route
entry_preconditions.freshness: all identities and the declared profile/exit remain current at typed-exit validation

validators.objective_scope: fixed profile scope reconstruction, deterministic scan, schema and whitelist validation, derived unchecked hits, live issue payload/result identities and canonical digests

published schema, fixed scope and scan completeness, selected-comment metadata, live issue payload/preimage/result binding, content freshness, classification structure, Gate/exit biconditional and result digest validation

external_exits.evidence: current complete scope and scan, zero unchecked hits, passed AI Review Gate, and no unconsumed content revision
one or more authorized revisions are bound to rebuilt scope, current content hashes, a complete rescan, and a passed AI Review Gate
missing scope or mutation authority, unconfirmed semantic change, refused required mutation, unchecked violation, or blocked AI Review Gate

reentry.identity: mode, profile, normalized scope items, scope/scan digests, current hits, revisions, classifications, Review Gate, confirmation and result digest
reentry.freshness: every content mutation invalidates prior hits and semantic evidence; the checker rebuilds the profile scope and deterministic scan before accepting the declared exit
